jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Lifestyle
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Lifestyle! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Meerut team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Lifestyle:
Lifestyle is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lifestyle!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
